title: uvifera excoriata
intro: Uvifera excoriata, also known as the 'Uva Ursi', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Ericaceae and is native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain tannins that have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Uva Ursi has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections, as well as to reduce the risk of kidney stones and to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Uvifera excoriata include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
